claim_boundary: Algebraic diameter-2 bridge plus classical Hoffman-Singleton adjacency spectrum refute the usual numerical reading of Graffiti 284. Lean does not construct the graph; public statement proxies are sealed under data/source_seals/; the Fajtlowicz WoW master list remains an external request-only remainder.
source: Graffiti / Written on the Wall conjecture 284 (min_dual <= -lambda_min(D), connected girth >= 5)
